_comment: Archetype probes for the T1 smoke set — each spans a known failure mode (md/13). The tuner augments this from results.jsonl history (highest variance + most-recently-regressed, ≥1 per producer) and prints why each fixture was selected. Edit deliberately: a fixture earns a seat by representing a class, not by annoying you.

fixtures.label: claude-impeccable/hero-cover
fixtures.reason: validity-halving archetype — perfect tree, invalid markup halves the score (50)

fixtures.label: codex-tailwind/media-text
fixtures.reason: structure archetype — image-beside-text → core/media-text (the idiom converters most often miss)

fixtures.label: claude-design/media-text
fixtures.reason: structure archetype — same brief, different producer markup (the producer spread is the point)

fixtures.label: codex-tailwind/feature-grid
fixtures.reason: messy-input archetype — Tailwind-soup; rules collapse where frontier holds
